sourceObservation: Derived from the care-style rendered sample: a full-card ambient surface divided into four quadrants, with a large primary value, small location/status, one fact panel, and one compact action target.
layoutSummary: Equal 2x2 quadrant composition over an ambient surface: primary value, status identity, support card, and icon action each occupy a 55 x 55 cell.
allowedEdits: remove actionCircle if no valid action exists
turn supportCard into non-click support only
forbiddenEdits: use emoji icons or SVG paths not declared in asset-library
place required text on a noisy image without scrim
deleteRules: If actionIcon is unavailable, remove actionCircle and widen supportCard to 116.

colorPolicy.budget: one weather/environment blue scene family plus optional confirm action

roles.foreground: font_on_primary/secondary only; no yellow foreground on saturated blue

rewriteRules: Do not use multi_color_11 yellow as text on the blue gradient.
If action semantics are unclear, remove actionCircle click behavior and keep it as neutral support.
